name: Fuuta Kajiyama
description: __Height:__ 165 cm __Status:__ Prisoner No.003 A young male prisoner, whose determination is apparent from his intense eyes. Among everybody in Milgram, he is the most impulsive and outspoken with a violent temper. Endowed with a strong sense of justice, he fiercely rebels against what he deems to be wrong. name: Haku
description: An Evol special agent, although he is officially assigned to the Koibana City (Loveland) Police Station as an ordinary officer.

name: Hibito Nanba
description: An extraordinarily talented astronaut, he was chosen to be the first Japanese person to go to the moon. He is known as the "Samurai Boy" in America, where he is very popular. He really wants Mutta to become an astronaut. He can play the guitar.

name: Holland Novak
description: **Affiliation**: Gekkostate **Relatives**: Azmodeus Novak (father), Cicily Kane (mother), ~! [Dewey Novak](https://anilist.co/character/4005/Dewey-Novak) (older brother), [Talho Yuuki](https://anilist.co/character/1530/Talho-Yuuki) (wife, implied), unnamed child (may be female) !~ Holland Novak is the leader of Gekkostate, captain of the Gekko, and pilot of the LFO Terminus typeR909 (and later the Terminus B303).

name: Hopachai Apachai
nativeName: アパチャイ・ホパチャイ
description: A 28-year-old master of Muay Thai and is known as the "Death God" of the Muay Thai underworld fighting circuit. Apachai has been fighting life or death battles in underground Muay Thai fights since he was a teenager. Later, he was an enforcer for a cruel pirate who accidentally fed Apachai while he was starving in a harbor in Thailand. name: Junta Teshima
description: He is now a third year student at Souhoku High School, the former ace, Shingo Kinjou, appointed him as the ace of the cycling club, and he takes his role very seriously. He is very smart and uses strategies to win races along with his close friend Aoyagi. He and Aoyagi decided to work together since they are both "average cyclists" who share the same dream of reaching the top. He is very supportive of Souhoku's cycling team as he helps to supply the team with water and energy food as part of the

name: Kedamono
description: Kedamono, Popee's assistant, is a wolf who, ashamed of his wolf-y nature, wears white masks with human facial features drawn on to disguise himself as just another member of the human race, even if his knees bend backward. (Source: Animefringe)

name: Marin Izutsumi
description: A rival assassin to [Konoha](https://anilist.co/character/341513/Konoha-Koga) who uses various inventions instead of combat ability. As an apology for kidnapping [Satoko,](https://anilist.co/character/341512/Satoko-Kusagakure) she sends [Roboko](https://anilist.co/character/350518/Roboko) to Konoha.

name: Misora Haruki
description: Haruki is a rather composed teenager that is able to "save" a current state of the world as she knows it and then "reset" to that state within three days. This is not manipulation of time but rather space in that it can be null under certain circumstances. Such as that of Asai Kei and his perfect memory, enabling him to recall the events before a reset occurred.
mediaTitles: Sakurada Reset: Cat, Ghost and Revolution Sunday

name: Morrigan Aensland
nativeName: モリガン・アーンスランド
description: The Japanese-produced Night Warriors: Darkstalker's Revenge anime featured Morrigan more like her game appearances, portraying her as a semi-innocent demon world inhabitant, a member of the royal family who was more interested in going to Earth than in her duties. The picture of idle rich, she would often leave at will out of mere boredom, much to the frustration of her guardians, elder men of the Aensland family. searchTerms: モリガン・アーンスランド

name: Natsuki Oikawa
description: A sixth-grade girl, and the daughter of Ayako. Natuski is a very talented dancer whose skill is leagues above her peers, but is generally too serious and her expressions are inadequate. Proud and perfectionist, Natsuki puts tremendous effort in ballet, striving to be the best. Natsuki feels attracted to Junpei as a dancer, as his expressive dancing matches her own views. Nekomaru is a vigorous, boisterous, openhearted student who is passionate about supporting athletes. name: Ryu Ishigori
description: __Species:__ Human __Occupation:__ Jujutsu Sorcerer He is a jujutsu sorcerer from the past who was incarnated by Kenjaku to participate in the Culling Game as a player. Ryu is a classic hotshot that both men and women admire. In his past life, he enjoyed both a good fight and the company of ladies. Even though Ryu has no regrets, he likens his previous life to a "moderate eater" with no "dessert" to satisfy him. name: Shimei Ryomou

name: Sketchy
description: Sketchy is [Oka](https://anilist.co/character/213236/)'s fennec fox.

name: Tatara Totsuka
description: __Height:__ 172 cm One of the original members of HOMRA along with Suoh and Kusanagi. He can get along with anyone, so he often sets the mood in HOMRA. Totsuka has a calm, laid-back and very friendly personality. He often engages in conversations with people, even strangers, showing that he is charismatic and somewhat talkative. name: Tatsuma Ushiyama
description: One of the Abashiri Convicts. Ushiyama is a pragmatic and serious criminal. Aiming to steal the Ainu gold, Ushiyama is focused on his mission and always threads with prudence, regularly offering reasonable advice to Hijikata. He is also a womanizer. Ushiyama lusts after any beautiful woman he comes across and is very direct when he solicits sex. It is his main way of distracting himself. name: Tenma Matsukaze
description: Matsukaze Tenma, a first year who loves soccer, is the new leading protagonist. His skills still need lots of development, but at least his dribbling is exceptional. He has a habit of saying “It’ll work out somehow.” The story starts with him entering Raimon Jr. High 10 years after the first FFI.

name: Tiaplate
description: Tiaplate is very lewd and intimate. She acts cutesy, but she doesn't register that she's lethal towards clients without fire resistance.

name: Ururu Tsumugiya
description: Ururu is a meek, black-haired girl who mostly does manual labor for the shop, as well as assisting Urahara in training Ichigo. She is Karakura Pink in Don Kanoji's superhero team and uses a multi-barreled cannon as her weapon. She seems to respond robotically when injured or when hollows initially appear.
